claim_bullets.bullet_text: Carpenter discusses cycle detection with Kidu (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.270-272).
Tortoise and Hare requires two iterators (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.270-272).

source_record_text: A narrative chapter where The Carpenter discusses cycle detection algorithms with an engineer named Kidu, focusing on the Tortoise and Hare algorithm and its variations, including a teleporting version and a set-based approach.
